nasb.text: with all his reign, his power, and the circumstances which came on him, on Israel, and on all the kingdoms of the lands.

esv.text: with accounts of all his rule and his might and of the circumstances that came upon him and upon Israel and upon all the kingdoms of the countries.

cnv.text: 還有他治理的一切國事，他的英勇事蹟，以及在他身上和以色列並各地列國發生的事蹟，都記在這些書上。

ccb.text: 书中记述了他的政绩和英勇事迹，以及他和以色列及列国所遭遇的事。
